We talked about opportunity switches yesterday and I didn't spend time on this year and I wanted to because tonight we're going to be using some of these pieces. So this is what we call the opportunity switch headline. And so I want to just think about last night, the new opportunity you guys were creating were trying to take someone from the vehicle they're in and switch them into the other one. Conceptually, I guess have like this is the new opportunity I'm putting people into. Sometimes it's hard like how do I say that quickly and easily to somebody? And so this headline, this is not always the best headline in the world, it's the best place to start from. And so basically what I look at is the concept is how to and then what do my people desire the most and then without the thing that causes them the most pain. So for example, when we sold our high ticket secrets course, we were helping people. A lot of people wanted to sell high ticket things, they didn't want to do it on the phone, right? So they wanted high ticket things. So my headline is like how to sell really, really expensive high ticket things. And then the fear was like, I don't want to be on the phone because I'm in the same way like, I'm so scared of the phones. There's a reason why none of you guys talked to me on the phone before you were sold because if you did, you wouldn't be here because I would have talked to you out of buying. So I'm the worst on the phone ever. It scares me more than anything. So the vehicle they're all in is like, I got to call people on the phone and sell them coaching. I was like, oh, that vehicle sucks. How to sell super expensive things without ever picking up the phone personally? And that was like my new vehicle and that offer crushed it for us and still does awesome. So it was like, that was how to where they desire most without what causes them the most pain. So funnel scripts, I use the exact same headline as well, how to get all of your sales letters, video sales letters, PowerPoints that everything created without, what's my headline now? Does anyone have it open? Without hiring an extensive copywriter or learning how to write copy yourself, something like that. But like that thing works so good because the current opportunity there is like, I either have to write copy which sucks or I have to hire a copywriter which is super expensive. I'm like, no, I got an opportunity. You don't do these things. We come over here, you get the thing you desire the most, but you don't have to do the thing that sucks the most. So this is the way to kind of frame your new opportunity. It's a simple, easy way. Now I'm not always going to use this as a headline. We'll talk about it tonight, but I do for probably three-fourths of the stuff I do. It's like the fastest, easiest headline. So I want you guys to do, we're going to start a quick workshop right now. I want you to think through that with your new opportunities. How to and then what do they desire the most without the things causing the most pain? It's like one of the easiest ways to kind of structure and frame your new opportunity in like a really fast headline that's easy to use. Does that make sense?
